title: Lankaster's Origins
description: Addon for the origins mod that adds 3 new origins.
body:
# Requires Origins and Pehkui
These Origins were completely built from the ground up by me

Click the image below to be taken to [Bisect's website](https://bisecthosting.com/lankaster)
[![Bisect Hosting Partner Link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/398b4588a625542f7717fd74c426b70e3026200c.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/lankaster)


**Iron Golem**

Iron body: You get 1.5x the normal amount of health, but normal sources of healing wont work, instead you have to repair yourself with iron.

Automaton: Because you are a robot, you do not need to eat.

Toss: Use your strong arms to toss enemies in front of you into the air

Sturdy legs: Due to your sturdy legs you only take fall damage after 9 blocks and take reduced fall damage

Unwieldy: Your hands are formed in a way that it is impossible to use a shield

Heavy: Due to being made out of metal, you are to heavy to swim and will sink in water

 

**Fairy**

Fairy wings: You have little wings to fly, using them is very exhausting though. Having an armor level above 12 will be too heavy to fly with.(Flight can be toggled with primary power key)

Small creature: You are 1/4 the size of a normal human, you have 3 less hearts and cant jump even a block

Forager: Living around nature your entire life, you have the knowledge to harvest crops more efficiently

Fairy magic: Use your healing magic to heal 2 hearts(4hp) to the entity you're looking at

Bee rider: Your friendly relationship with the bees allow you to use them as mounts 

Vegetarian: Cannot eat meat

Weak arms: Can only mine stone is less then 2 other stone blocks around it.

 

**Vampire**

Vampirism: You cannot heal normally, instead suck blood from your enemies to heal yourself. Excess blood goes to the blood meter.

Photoallergic: Being in daylight causes you to burn

Nocturnal: See slightly better in the dark.

Pillager Aligned: Villagers don't like you and pillagers like you.

Shadow dash(primary): Use 20 blood from the blood meter to dash forward and become invisible. While invisible your attacks inflict wither and deal 1.2x damage.

Bat form(secondary): Transform into a bat, costing 2 blood per second. In bat form, you can fly and are do not burn in the sun, but only have 2 hearts and cannot use tools or weapons.
